description: CompositionGreen and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, buttoned placket on the front, patch pocket on the left chest with brand name appliqued on it and a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryUpgrade your casual look with this checked green and white shirt from lee. The patch pocket with the appliqued brand tab adds an element of interest, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
